$comment: SliceOps naming hook — copy into a corpus as .claude/settings.json (and the validator as .claude/hooks/naming_validator.py). Blocks agent writes of non-homologated names at the point of write (DEC-0008 / DEC-0009 / DEC-0010 (naming v2)). The hook travels WITH the corpus (git or file sync), so every machine enforces the same rule.
